header.title: Header
header.description: Text section used to document the analysis.

settings.title: Settings Section
settings.description: Settings that control different aspects of the analysis.

planes.description: List of [x,y,z] unit vectors defining the crack planes to use in the analysis.

material_analysis.title: Material Analysis Definitions
material_analysis.description: Material analysis definitions that will be performed for each material definition.

ageing_crack_growth_rate.description: Crack growth rate curves at varying ages.

crack_growth_rate.description: Crack growth rate curves at varying R ratios.

stress_strain.description: Stress-Strain curves for different modes of deformation.

outputs.title: Output Requests
outputs.description: List of output requests for the analysis.

table.description: List of [T,dcdn] points. Units: ([energy_release_rate], [length]/[cycle]) e.g. (J/m^2, m/cycle), (kJ/m^2, mm/cycle), (in*lb/in^2, in/cycle)
List of [T,dcdt] points. Units: ([energy_release_rate], [length]/[time]) e.g. (J/m^2, m/s), (kJ/m^2, mm/s), (in*lb/in^2, in/s)

length.description: Specify the number of histories in the analysis

histories.description: An array of histories or a file path to an external input file containing an array of histories

schedule.description: A schedule definition of steps and blocks, where a block is defined by an external input file containing an array of histories
